content:
This was initially started when I played the game for 2 months and I wanted a "stuff I wish I knew sooner" guide. 

I've updated it since then. I'll update again during the christmas break.

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1KfZ4o6Mx-sVTZh_mHRAz7Zq4h44O6YBnxtaVQ2Y-eeo/edit?usp=sharing
